entries.definition: Causing difficulty in breathing or a feeling of being unable to breathe; also used figuratively to describe an oppressive or stifling atmosphere.
entries.exampleSentence: The suffocating heat made it hard to sleep at night.

entries.definition: To cause someone to die or lose consciousness by preventing breathing; to make someone feel trapped or oppressed.
entries.exampleSentence: Many people were suffocated by the smoke from the fire.
